text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While on my way to the office, I bump into Seiun
Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, drop that already. I've just been kind of
obsessed with watching chess tournament videos
late into the night.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They're fun and make me think about what I
would have done. Plus I can learn new strategies
too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The matches are so intense. I'd love to play in one
someday.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I couldn't manage a match right now though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky dreams of a chess showdown, but it
looks like the sandman already has her in
checkmate.
